name: @intentsolutionsio/api-mock-server
description: Create mock API servers from OpenAPI specs for testing

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install api-mock-server\\n  or /plugin install api-mock-server@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
